chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH KARACHI Const. Petition No. D-123 of 2026 __________________________________________________________________ Date Order with signature(s) of Judge(s)  For orders as to non-prosecution 12.02.2026 Mr. Sajid Baloch, Advocate for the petitioner Mr. Sageer Ahmed Abbasi, Additional Advocate General, Sindh alongwith SIP Muhammad Aslam, P.S Pak Colony ---------------------- Learned counsel for the petitioner submits that missing person namely Arsalan S/o Suleman has been surfaced, therefore, he does press instant petition. Accordingly, instant petition is dismissed as not pressed. JUDGE HEAD OF CONST. BENCHES JUDGE B-K Soomro
